Tests the division of a string converted to a number in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of JavaScript's type coercion during division. It creates a new `String` object with the value `"2"` and divides it by the number `1`. The assertion verifies that the result of this operation is strictly equal to the number `2`. This test demonstrates JavaScript's ability to convert a string to a number when performing arithmetic operations.
